summary: Daily Gate Sessions feature (iteration 14) testing complete. Backend: 17/17 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All features verified working. BUG FIXED: Batch create sessions was failing due to duplicate 'id' key error.

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Batch create sessions was failing with TypeError: dict() got multiple values for keyword argument 'id'. The deepcopy already included 'id' field, and the code was trying to add another one.
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Changed from list comprehension using dict(**copy.deepcopy(t), id=...) to explicit loop that modifies the 'id' field after copying

backend: test_get_gate_sessions_by_floor - GET with floor_id filter works
test_create_session_clones_gates - POST /api/admin/gate-sessions creates session with cloned gates
test_complete_session - PUT marks session as completed
test_batch_create_sessions - POST /api/admin/gate-sessions/batch creates multiple sessions (BUG FIX)
frontend: Floor selector shows gate map floors
Monthly calendar displays with day dots for sessions
Session card in history shows Feb 23 session in draft status
Session created with 17 gates cloned from master markers
Map tab shows gate markers - green (open) and red (closed) dots
Gate list tab shows all 17 gates in card format
Clicking gate card opens edit dialog
Edit dialog has 4 status buttons: مفتوح/مغلق/مزدحم/صيانة
New session dialog shows with date picker and clone options
Batch entry dialog shows with date range inputs

seed_data_creation: One existing session on 2026-02-23 with 17 gates
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Gate Sessions feature fully tested - iteration 14. Gate session API endpoints at /api/gate-sessions and /api/admin/gate-sessions. Gate map floor ID: '45574a22-a162-4826-8c55-a79e09c7e5fe'. 17 gate markers in system. Status configs: open(green), closed(red), crowded(orange), maintenance(gray).
